alertReason.en: This patient has had 2 or more red weeks in a row.
alertReason.rw: Uyu murwayi afite ibyumweru 2 cyangwa birenga afite ibipimo bibi.

alertReason.en: This patient has not logged any readings in 5 or more days.
alertReason.rw: Uyu murwayi ntiyanditse ibipimo by'amaraso mu minsi 5 cyangwa irenga.

alertReason.en: This patient's average reading this week is critically high (≥200 mg/dL).
alertReason.rw: Igipimo cy'amaraso cy'uyu murwayi iki cyumweru ni hejuru cyane (≥200 mg/dL).
